TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_list = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_list, t1.list, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.list = follow_case_list;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: randomly shuffle array (Fisher–Yates)
    for (int i = follow_case.n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        int j = rand() % (i + 1);
        int temp = follow_case.list[i];
        follow_case.list[i] = follow_case.list[j];
        follow_case.list[j] = temp;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
